_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: FLAG-WT and mutant neurofibromin immunoprecipitates (IPs) from 293T NF1−/− were tested for dimerization with cotransfected HA-WT neurofibromin
details: Demonstrated neurofibromin dimerization capability and SPRED1 interaction in mutants despite reduced expression
